benefits.title: Benefits of Working with PRO HOME®
benefits.best_rates_title: Best rental rates in the market guaranteed
benefits.best_rates_desc: In most cases, we can increase the monthly payment you receive for your property by 5% to 15%. We achieve this thanks to our partnerships and our expertise in finding the best tenants, allowing us to improve your income safely and effectively.
benefits.tenant_mgmt_desc: In addition to our 10-step new tenant screening program, the secret to our success is being proactive and maintaining constant communication with our tenants.
benefits.maintenance_desc: We have built our own team to handle maintenance and repairs on the properties we manage. Additionally, we have carefully selected suppliers, achieving preferential pricing.
benefits.support_desc: Pro Home is an expert in corporate housing logistics, ensuring efficient and personalized management to meet the needs of companies requiring quality spaces for their employees or temporary projects.

contact.title: Contact
contact.hours: Monday to Friday 09:00 – 18:00 hrs / Saturdays 09:00 – 13:00 hrs

footer.objective_text: Our goal is to provide you with the peace of mind you need to maximize your income. We have a wide range of tools and deep knowledge in various areas, which we strategically combine to create mutual success.

services_detail.admin_desc: Comprehensive property management under the B2B model. We handle everything: tenant screening, contracts, maintenance, and billing.
services_detail.short_term_desc: Complete management of your property on short-term rental platforms. 6 steps: evaluation, photography, listing, reservation management, cleaning, and reports.
services_detail.investment_desc: We advise you on purchasing high-return properties. Market analysis, property search, and complete document management.
services_detail.cleaning_desc: Professional cleaning services for check-in/check-out and regular property maintenance.
services_detail.maintenance_desc: In-house maintenance and repair team. Preferential pricing with selected suppliers.
services_detail.design_desc: Furnishing and decoration of apartments to maximize appeal and rental value.
services_detail.corporate_desc: Housing solutions for companies operating in the Antofagasta Region. Comprehensive accommodation management for work teams.
